label: Background light layout (additive glow decals)
description: Per-background decorative light layout (OZX-547). The 'id' must equal the background sprite's asset name (e.g. 'FactoryWall_Big_All_1') so the displayed background — including a randomly-picked variant — is matched to its own light layout. Each light is an additive glow stamped onto the ground-lighting layer at an absolute world position. Data only; rendering is OZX-548.
